import React from "react"; import Nav from "./Nev"; function Contact() { let [uname, setusername] = useState(); let [email, setemail] = useState(); let [message, setmessage] = useState(); let [mobile, setmobile] = useState(); const navigate = useNavigate(); function handleForm(e) { e.preventDefault(); // console.log(username, email, password); //const data = [uname, email, contact,password] const data={ name:uname, email:email, mobile:mobile, message:message } console.log(data); axios({ method: "post", url: "http://localhost/Petshop/contact.php", data: data, headers: { "Content-Type": "multipart/form-data" }, }).then(res => { console.log(res); alert("Thank You For Contact us Will Contact you Soon"); navigate(`/`); }) } return(
